source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts CIK0001772016 + hand-sourced web (price, growth, ownership)

eps_history.source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts CIK0001772016 (EarningsPerShareDiluted, FY ending ~Sep 30; from 10-K filings)

dividend_per_share.source: No CommonStockDividendsPerShareDeclared concept in SEC EDGAR; stockanalysis.com/Nasdaq show no dividend history. BellRing pays no dividend.

long_term_growth_estimate_pct.source: Simply Wall St analyst consensus forward EPS growth (~12.4%/yr); ESTIMATE - favor proven growth. Note: analysts likely cutting after Q2 FY2026 EPS miss.

insider_activity.value: No notable recent insider buying found. Company actively repurchasing: new $300M authorization effective 2025-03-07 (2-yr); in FY2026 H1 bought 4.2M shares for $123.1M (~$29 avg), ~$516.9M remaining under authorization (Q2 FY2026 10-Q, end 2026-03-31). Shares O/S fell from ~128.3M (Jan 2025) to ~116.3M (Apr 2026).
insider_activity.source: SEC EDGAR 10-Q (filed 2026-05-05) + StockTitan; BellRing IR FY2025 release

buybacks.value: $300M authorization (effective 2025-03-07, 2-yr term); ~$516.9M total remaining across authorizations; 4.2M shares repurchased in FY2026 H1.
buybacks.source: BellRing Q2 FY2026 10-Q + StockTitan buyback news
